name: Flour Tortilla
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Lard (yes, lard. Shortening doesn't work as well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the dry ingredients and sift.
2. Add the lard to the mixture.
3. Gradually add warm milk, mixing until smooth.
4. Cut into pieces.
5. Roll out each piece into a very thin round shape.
6. Cook on a hot griddle until lightly browned and spotted.
